adopted_roadmap.fase_iii_summary: 3 DGs shipped + 3 Baselines PASS validated: DG-130 A (per-fingerprint verdict persistence) Baseline-14 PASS banner heurístico 3-path; DG-131 A (R20 cross-finding correlation) Baseline-15 PASS post-hotfixes DG-131.0.1 placebo + DG-131.0.2 real — grouping + confidence downgrade + rationale suffix; DG-132 A (R22 diff-aware mode enhancement) Baseline-16 PASS — breakdown line + CI/CD gates + JSON export. Cumulative achievement FASE III: trust cross-session behavior empíricamente REALIZED cross-5-scan trajectory. Users AHORA VEN VISUALMENTE cross-scan verdict shifts + provider shifts + confidence deltas + grouping propagation con reason categorization + delta metrics. Cross-provider reproducibility gap dramatic collected empíricamente (fast-xml-parser CVE-2026-41650 oscillated 0.0-1.0 confidence across 5 scans with 2 providers). Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 4-6 semanas. 11 hotfixes decimal + 42 sub-DGs cumulative.
adopted_roadmap.fase_ii_summary: 3 DGs shipped + 3 Baselines PASS validated: DG-127 A (signature attachment) H3-implicit-con-verdict-shift Baseline-11 INC→FP; DG-128 A (body scan taint propagation) H3-implicit-refinement Baseline-12 categorical FP; DG-129 A (module trust boundary tagging) H3-STRUCTURAL-SHIFT Baseline-13 FP→INC. Cumulative achievement: North Star principle empíricamente REALIZED — el LLM ahora razona sobre findings cross-module con contexto de signature + body content + attack surface. Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 3-4 semanas.
adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 3/3 DGs validated PASS categorical — FASE III COMPLETE (DG-130 A Baseline-14 PASS + DG-131 A Baseline-15 PASS + DG-132 A Baseline-16 PASS). Post-FASE III: awaiting user roadmap decision (3-option Decision Gate: release v0.3.22 marketplace / FASE IV backlog / STOP + user input).

activeDG.title: R22 diff-aware mode enhancement — tercer y último DG de FASE III 'trust cross-session' — Sub-A2 Balanced COMPLETED_VALIDATED_PASS_CATEGORICAL
activeDG.baseline_16_pass_signals: (1) Terminal breakdown line 'Scan diff vs previous triage: 1 new, 9 re-classified (0 class, 9 confidence, 0 provider), 34 unchanged.' PASS. (2) Sidebar summary card breakdown line matching terminal. (3) Per-rc detail lines con [reason] tag + Δ delta metrics. (4) Baseline-15 gap RESUELTO: 9 confidence-delta counted correctly. (5) DG-130 A regression PASS: Previously (4 prior verdicts) cross-5-scan trajectory. (6) DG-131 A regression PASS: badges GROUPED + rationale suffix + downgrade 75%→68%. (7) Institutional lesson learned: anomaly initial (0 provider vs empirical dogfood 10) resolved via DB inspection — mystery 03:11 user run reveal.
activeDG.cross_provider_reproducibility_gap_evide: fast-xml-parser CVE-2026-41650 cross-5-scan trajectory: INC 0.5 (v4-flash) → INC 1.0 (v4-flash) → INC 0.9 (v4-flash) → INC 1.0 (v4-pro) → INC 0.0 (v4-pro JsonParseError). Dramatic cross-provider variance empirically collected — validates North Star principle + FASE III design goals.
